TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_caket, title = caket, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/caket} }

S.FORM: == caket == Â±±Áæå siwkay nu caket u kidu nu caket mahiza u adidi'ay a ngabul, singawa i ayaw nu tangah, u kulit sa malecad tu. iayaw sa miadup tu caket ku Sakizaya a miadupay. ayzasa, caay kayadah tu ku caket i buyu, amana miadup satu ku sefu nu mita. u sulit nu Hulam atu Amilika The Reeves's muntjac (Muntiacus reevesi; Chinese: Â±±Áæå) is a muntjac species found widely in southeastern China (from Gansu to Yunnan) and Taiwan. It has also been introduced in Belgium, the Netherlands, the United Kingdom (south England, the Midlands,, east Wales), Ireland, and Japan. It takes its name from John Reeves, an employee of the British East India Company in the 19th century.
S.PHON: == ¶ak…ôt == ** siwkaj nu ¶ak…ôt u kidu nu ¶ak…ôt maƒßiza u adidi î~ °aj a ≈ãabur~…æ, si≈ãawa i ajaw nu ta≈ãaƒß, u kur~…æit sa mar~…æ…ô ¶ad tu. iajaw sa miadup tu ¶ak…ôt ku sakizaja a miadupaj. ajzasa, ¶aaj kajadaƒß tu ku ¶ak…ôt i buju, amana miadup satu ku s…ôfu nu mita. u sur~…æit nu ƒßur~…æam atu amir~…æika tƒß…ô *…ô…ô*…ôs î~ °s muntja ¶ (muntia ¶us r…ô…ô*…ôsi; ¶ƒßin…ôs…ô: **) is a muntja ¶ sp…ô ¶i…ôs found wid…ôr~…æj in soutƒß…ôast…ôrn ¶ƒßina (from gansu to junnan) and taiwan. it ƒßas ar~…æso b…ô…ôn introdu ¶…ôd in b…ôr~…ægium, tƒß…ô n…ôtƒß…ôrr~…æands, tƒß…ô unit…ôd ki≈ãdom (soutƒß …ô≈ãr~…æand, tƒß…ô midr~…æands,, …ôast war~…æ…ôs), ir…ôr~…æand, and *apan. it tak…ôs its nam…ô from *oƒßn *…ô…ô*…ôs, an …ômpr~…æoj…ô…ô of tƒß…ô britisƒß …ôast india ¶ompanj in tƒß…ô **tƒß ¶…ônturj.
S.FORM: == caket == Â±±Áæå siwkay nu caket u kidu nu caket mahiza u adidi'ay a ngabul, singawa i ayaw nu tangah, u kulit sa malecad tu. iayaw sa miadup tu caket ku Sakizaya a miadupay. ayzasa, caay kayadah tu ku caket i buyu, amana miadup satu ku sefu nu mita. u sulit nu Hulam atu Amilika The Reeves's muntjac (Muntiacus reevesi; Chinese: Â±±Áæå) is a muntjac species found widely in southeastern China (from Gansu to Yunnan) and Taiwan. It has also been introduced in Belgium, the Netherlands, the United Kingdom (south England, the Midlands,, east Wales), Ireland, and Japan. It takes its name from John Reeves, an employee of the British East India Company in the 19th century.
S.PHON: == ¶ak…ôt == ** siwkaj nu ¶ak…ôt u kidu nu ¶ak…ôt maƒßiza u adidi î~ °aj a ≈ãabur~…æ, si≈ãawa i ajaw nu ta≈ãaƒß, u kur~…æit sa mar~…æ…ô ¶ad tu. iajaw sa miadup tu ¶ak…ôt ku sakizaja a miadupaj. ajzasa, ¶aaj kajadaƒß tu ku ¶ak…ôt i buju, amana miadup satu ku s…ôfu nu mita. u sur~…æit nu ƒßur~…æam atu amir~…æika tƒß…ô *…ô…ô*…ôs î~ °s muntja ¶ (muntia ¶us r…ô…ô*…ôsi; ¶ƒßin…ôs…ô: **) is a muntja ¶ sp…ô ¶i…ôs found wid…ôr~…æj in soutƒß…ôast…ôrn ¶ƒßina (from gansu to junnan) and taiwan. it ƒßas ar~…æso b…ô…ôn introdu ¶…ôd in b…ôr~…ægium, tƒß…ô n…ôtƒß…ôrr~…æands, tƒß…ô unit…ôd ki≈ãdom (soutƒß …ô≈ãr~…æand, tƒß…ô midr~…æands,, …ôast war~…æ…ôs), ir…ôr~…æand, and *apan. it tak…ôs its nam…ô from *oƒßn *…ô…ô*…ôs, an …ômpr~…æoj…ô…ô of tƒß…ô britisƒß …ôast india ¶ompanj in tƒß…ô **tƒß ¶…ônturj.
